description:
This quiz tests advanced HTML5 skills, focusing on semantic elements beyond basic tags like `<div>` and `<span>`. It has an intermediate difficulty level and uses a playful, engaging tone to challenge learners while emphasizing practical application. The quiz aims to reinforce understanding of modern HTML5 best practices.
Topics: Semantic HTML5 elements, HTML5 best practices, Web development fundamentals
Audience: Front-end developers or web developers seeking to enhance their HTML5 proficiency
